title: LEDGERLINE
desc: Rebuilt a bank's overnight settlement pipeline to run incrementally instead of nightly — cut reconciliation time from 6 hours to 40 minutes across 14 currencies.

title: FIELDNOTE
desc: Conflict-free sync layer for researchers working without signal. Used across nine field stations to merge edits from 40+ devices with zero data loss.

title: ROUTEMARK
desc: Self-service deploy tooling that took a 12-step runbook down to one command, and cut average lead time for change from two days to under an hour.
